creator: dyeske@yahoo.com
text:
That looks good to me, please also flag this with DEPRECATED and EXPIRATION_DATE of 2007-06-01.

----- Original Message ----
From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
To: dyeske@yahoo.com
Sent: Sunday, April 15, 2007 9:50:37 PM
Subject: Re: ports/111655: [patch] audio/freebirth - cleanup non-supported FreeBSD versions

Maintainer of audio/freebirth,

Please note that PR ports/111655 has just been submitted.

If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
and a committer will take care of it.

The full text of the PR can be found at:
    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111655

-- 
Edwin Groothuis
edwin@FreeBSD.org
